result.summary: Found 3 issues: one major layout overlap obscuring legal text, one accessibility issue with fine print readability, and one minor visual inconsistency.

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' button overlay is positioned directly on top of the legal disclaimer/fine print text at the bottom of the page, making portions of the required legal text unreadable and cut off on both sides.
issues.suggestion: Move the 'SCROLL DOWN' CTA button above or below the legal disclaimer section, or ensure the legal text is fully visible and not obscured by any overlapping elements.

issues.description: The legal disclaimer/fine print text is extremely small (appears to be around 7-8px equivalent) and uses low contrast gray text on a light background, making it nearly impossible to read, especially on mobile screens.
issues.suggestion: Increase the font size to at least 10-12px and ensure sufficient color contrast ratio (minimum 4.5:1) to meet WCAG AA accessibility standards for small text.

issues.description: The fine print text container appears to have inconsistent left and right padding, causing the text to appear cramped and clipped at the edges of the screen.
issues.suggestion: Add consistent horizontal padding (e.g., 16px on each side) to the legal disclaimer container to ensure text doesn't run to the very edge of the screen.
